C

connect() - Method in class org.mule.extension.datapartition.internal.DataPartitionConnectionProvider
 
countBytesAndLines(InputStream) - Static method in class org.mule.extension.datapartition.internal.StreamUtils
Counts bytes and lines in a single pass.
countJsonItems(DataPartitionConfiguration, InputStream) - Method in class org.mule.extension.datapartition.internal.DataPartitionOperations
Counts bytes and top-level items in a JSON array InputStream using Jackson streaming.
countLines(InputStream) - Static method in class org.mule.extension.datapartition.internal.StreamUtils
Counts the number of lines in an InputStream by counting newline bytes.
countLines(DataPartitionConfiguration, InputStream) - Method in class org.mule.extension.datapartition.internal.DataPartitionOperations
Counts bytes and lines in an InputStream by streaming through it (8KB buffer).
